rulings.Case Title: UNITED THREE GROUPS, INC. VS. EAST WEST BANK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Motion And Defendant East West Banks Motion To Strike With Respect To Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday November 17, 2015, line 6. DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANK Notice Of Hearing On Motion And Defendant East West Banks Motion To Strike With Respect To Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to the allegations re: punitive damages with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts showing malice, oppression or fraud. Motion is otherwise denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: UNITED THREE GROUPS, INC. VS. EAST WEST BANK ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday November 17, 2015, line 6. DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANK DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED in part and SUSTAINED in part. Demurrer to the first cause of action for wrongful foreclose and to the third cause of action for UCL violation is overruled, Plaintiff sufficiently alleges that the amount demanded in August 29, 2012 NOD was overstated. (FAC paragraph 19). Demurrer to the second cause of action for fraud is sustained with leave to amend to allege each element of this cause of action with requisite specificity. Demurer to the fourth cause of action fro accounting is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege that some balance is due to Plaintiff on the loan at issue in this case. = (501/REQ)
